commit.message:
style: redesign navbar icons and mobile tab-bar layout

Redraw all four SVGs for clarity at small sizes: hardcover
cookbook with curved pages and visible binding, Thai mortar
and pestle, sharp-cornered restaurant menu card, classic
shopping cart. Bump icon size from 1rem to 1.15rem with
heavier 1.8 stroke weight. Mobile view switches from
hidden labels to a tab-bar layout with icons above tiny
labels, matching familiar mobile app patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add audio recovery recorder with realtime-to-batch fallback

Always writes audio chunks to a local recovery file during transcription.
On realtime STT WebSocket disconnect, automatically retries using the
saved audio via ElevenLabs batch API. On app crash, orphaned recovery
files surface in a banner on next launch with Process/Discard actions.

- wavUtils.ts: extract shared buildWavBuffer() helper
- recoveryRecorder.ts: RecoveryRecorder class writing to
  {userData}/transcription-recovery/; sidecar JSON; TTL 7-day cleanup
- session.ts: activeRecovery alongside all non-Swift backends; push()
  in audio-chunk IPC + AudioCapture onChunk callbacks; cleanup after
  successful processTranscript(); handleUnexpectedClose() retries via
  batch when ElevenLabs key + buffered audio available; extract
  postToElevenLabsBatch() for WAV+WebM support; 3 new IPC handlers
- TranscriptionRecoveryBanner.vue: Process/Discard banner in App.vue
- NoteEditor.vue: amber dot + "Retrying…" status during batch retry
- style.css: .main-column wrapper; .retrying dot colour

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Demean Time-of-Day flow metrics + fix ALL remaining tooltip colors

Backend:
- Demean net_flow and bar_imbalance in Time-of-Day by subtracting the overall
  hourly average across all regimes. Binance taker_buy_vol averages 48.7% of
  total volume (not 50%), creating a persistent negative bias. Demeaning shows
  regime-relative signal: BULL now shows positive (more buying than average),
  BEAR shows negative, CHOP near zero. Volume and trade size unchanged.

Frontend:
- Updated Time-of-Day description explaining the demeaning
- Fixed ALL 7 remaining tooltips with black text (ImbalanceChart, PriceVolumeChart,
  BuySellVolumeChart, RollingImbalanceChart, CumulativeFlowChart, RegimesPage x2)
- Every tooltip across all components now has color: '#e5e5e5'

commit.message:
Stop pre-caching CDN scripts in service worker install

CDN URLs (Chart.js, pdf.js) in cache.addAll() caused SW install
failures when CSP blocked cross-origin fetch from SW context. This
left zombie workers piling up on every refresh. CDN scripts are now
cached lazily via the fetch handler when the page loads them normally.

commit.message:
Fix date display in news feed and filter Federal Register antidumping noise

Bug 1 (Date confusion): The tooltip in the Latest News feed showed only
"Effective: [date]" with no label for the publication date, causing confusion
between the article date, effective date, and display date. Fixed:
- Column header renamed from "Date" to "Published" for clarity
- Tooltip now shows "Published: [formatted date]" explicitly
- Effective date label changed from "Effective:" to "Effective date:"

Bug 2 (Federal Register antidumping flooding feed): The feed_exclude flag
was set in sources.yaml for Federal Register but was never propagated into
extracted claims, so the viz filter had no effect. 187 routine AD/CVD
proceedings were appearing in Latest News. Fixed:
- extract_claims.py now carries feed_exclude from raw article into claim JSON
- claim.schema.json updated to allow feed_exclude field
- Both viz/src/data.js and docs/src/data.js now apply two-layer filtering:
  (1) feed_exclude flag for future claims, (2) content-based pattern matching
  for existing data — 26 regex patterns covering administrative reviews,
  five-year reviews, preliminary/final determinations, duty orders, scope
  rulings, and DOC determination notices. All 187 existing routine claims
  are now filtered from the feed.

fix: use classpath resource lookup for index.html in uberjar

slurp with relative path "resources/public/index.html" works in dev
(CWD = project root) but fails in uberjar where resources are packed
inside the JAR. Switch to (io/resource "public/index.html") which
searches the classpath correctly in both environments.

commit.message:
fix: include pre-built CLI dist/ in repo for Windows compatibility

The sf_cli/dist/ directory was gitignored, meaning users who cloned
the framework on Windows had no compiled CLI — sf.cmd pointed at
dist/index.js which didn't exist. The install script builds it, but
if npm/tsc fails silently, users get "Cannot find module" errors.

Fix: un-ignore sf_cli/dist/ specifically (other dist/ dirs stay
ignored) and track the pre-built output. Users no longer need a
successful npm build during install for the CLI to work.

Quiz results: add versus comparison links for top picks

When a user completes the quiz and sees their results, there's now
a 'Compare your top picks' section between the #1 match and the
runner-ups. Shows up to 3 versus links like:
  'Stake vs CMC Markets' | 'Stake vs Moomoo' | 'Stake vs CommSec'

Each links directly to /versus/[slug]-vs-[slug] for instant
head-to-head comparison.

This is a high-value internal link because:
1. Quiz completers are high-intent users deciding between platforms
2. The versus page answers their exact next question ('which one?')
3. More internal links to /versus improves its SEO authority
4. Versus pages have affiliate CTAs (revenue opportunity)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

#879 Implement SES integration and environment configuration (#1040)

## Issue

Closes #879

## 概要

本番環境向けの AWS SES 連携を有効化する。通知基盤（#875）で実装済みの `SesNotificationSender` を DI
コンテナに配線し、環境変数 `NOTIFICATION_BACKEND=ses` で SES バックエンドに切り替えられるようにする。

当初 Terraform SES ドメイン検証も含む予定だったが、Terraform インフラ基盤（provider、state
backend）が未整備のため別 Issue に分離した。

### 変更内容

- `notification/ses.rs` に `create_ses_client()` 関数を追加（AWS SDK クライアント初期化）
- `notification.rs` に `SesClient` 型エイリアスを追加（re-export）
- `app_builder.rs` に "ses" match arm を追加、`build_app` シグネチャに `ses_client:
Option<SesClient>` を追加
- `main.rs` で `NOTIFICATION_BACKEND=ses` のときのみ SES クライアントを条件付き生成

## 品質確認

- 設計・ドキュメント: `docs/40_詳細設計書/16_通知機能設計.md` 既存（変更なし）、セッションログ
`prompts/runs/2026-03/2026-03-05_2120_SES連携と環境設定.md`、計画ファイル
`prompts/plans/879_ses-integration.md`、ADR 該当なし
- Issue との整合: SES DI 配線と環境変数切替を達成。Terraform 定義は別 Issue に分離（Issue
本文に記載済み）
- テスト: 既存の `SesNotificationSender` Send+Sync テスト通過、コンパイル確認で型安全性検証。AWS
接続が必要な統合テストは CI 対象外
- コード品質（マイナス→ゼロ）: S3 クライアント初期化パターンに準拠、infra 経由の re-export でレイヤー依存違反なし
- 品質向上（ゼロ→プラス）: 不要な中間層なし、`SesClient` 型エイリアスで依存境界を明確化
- UI/UX: N/A（バックエンドのみ）
- 横断検証: N/A（単一 Phase の変更）
- `just check` + CI pass: 確認予定

## 確認項目

- [x] `just check` + CI が通る

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
fix: harden entity extraction flow — remove eager summary generation, deduplicate logic

- Remove generateAndSaveSummary() call from Telegram /save entity loop (was firing
  1 OpenAI call per entity, turning 3s saves into 30s). Summaries now generated
  on-demand via /entity command only.
- Extract upsertEntitiesAndLink to lib/entities.ts (was duplicated in 3 places)
- Merge entity structured data instead of overwriting (prevents data loss when a
  later note mentions an entity without role/org info)
- Only invalidate summary_updated_at when structured data actually changed
- Add ignoreDuplicates guard on knowledge_links insert
- Normalize entity names to lowercase before storage (fixes Alice vs alice dedup)
- Fix PUT ordering: run AI extraction before deleting old links (reduces consistency
  gap from ~5s to ~50ms)
- Add migration: unique index on entities(user_id,lower(name)) and
  knowledge_links(knowledge_id,entity_id)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(predictions): use ONLY API data, improved H2H calculation

Major changes:
- H2H now uses weighted calculation from API data (recent years = more weight)
- Removed all hardcoded/approximated values in predictions
- _out_from_sportmonks returns None for unavailable fields (not approximations)
- _parse_sportmonks_predictions_array returns 0 instead of dummy values
- Added detailed logging for H2H parsing

H2H improvements:
- Parses /fixtures/head-to-head API response correctly
- Identifies home/away teams in each H2H match
- Applies year-based weighting (1.0, 0.8, 0.6, 0.4, 0.2)
- Calculates wins/draws/losses from perspective of current home team

Predictions cleanup:
- exact_scores: [] (not calculated)
- most_likely_score: None (not calculated)
- total_goals_distribution: None (not calculated)
- double_chance: None (not calculated)
- asian_handicap: None (not calculated)
- over_under: only 2.5 line from API (not 0.5, 1.5, 3.5)

Next: Championship context for motivation, remove UI sections

commit.message:
feat(utilization): redesign dashboard with 7-day daily granularity, tabs, expandable rows

Major rewrite of the utilization pipeline to match (and exceed) the Lambda Excel report:

Schema: +15 fields on UtilizationMetric — cpuMin, memoryMin, disk usage (GB/%),
instance metadata (appName, vCpu, memoryGib, state, privateIp), EBS volumes JSON,
ECS fields (cluster, task counts).

CloudWatch collection: rewritten for per-day granularity (7 daily windows,
Period=86400) instead of 7-day aggregate. Collects EC2 + RDS + ECS with CW Agent
disk metrics, EBS volume discovery, and instance metadata enrichment.

Analysis: multi-day idle detection (cpuMax > 30% on any day = not idle), disk-based
recommendations (80% warning, 90% critical), uses appName in recommendations.

Dashboard: EC2/RDS/ECS tab navigation, 5 KPI cards, search/sort/filter, expandable
rows with 7-day daily breakdown table + EBS volumes + recommendation callout.
Threshold coloring (CPU/Mem ≥70% red, ≥50% orange; Disk ≥80% red, ≥60% orange).

Agent tools: query_utilization returns daily granularity with new filters
(mem_below, disk_above, account_id, include_daily, limit).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 重写 get_table_name，支持多级混合后缀剥离

原正则 _?[0-9]+$ 存在贪婪匹配 bug（如 _bta58_2023 会错误保留 _bta）。
改为循环两步剥离直至稳定：
  Step1: (_[a-zA-Z]{1,3}[0-9]+|_[0-9]+)+$ 剥离 _ 开头的数字/短代码段
  Step2: [0-9]+$ 剥离直连的裸数字尾缀

字母超过3位视为表名组成部分（_info1 只剥 1，_bta58 整段剥离）。
支持 tbinstinfo_bta58→tbinstinfo、user_info1→user_info、
order10_2023→order 等场景。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

display: wrap long messages to row 1 matching C topl.c behavior

C update_topl() inserts newlines at word boundaries when message exceeds CO
columns, displaying across rows 0 and 1. more() places --More-- on the last
row used (row 1 if wrapped).

JS was breaking at cols-10 and keeping --More-- on row 0, causing cursor
divergence in seed031: C reported [19,1] while JS reported [48,0].

Fix both Display and HeadlessDisplay:
- Display: break at cols-1 (matching C CO-1 scan), write overflow to row 1,
  renderMoreMarker() places --More-- on row 1 when _topMessageRow1 is set,
  _clearMore() also clears row 1 on dismissal.
- HeadlessDisplay: add setCursor() after --More-- on row 1 so cursor
  comparisons see the correct row-1 position.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Current Rates tab to show correct total tariff rates per country/sector

The rate matrix was displaying the rate from the latest individual claim
instead of the true total (sum of all applicable tariff layers). This caused
incorrect values like China Electronics showing 25% (Section 301 alone) instead
of 35% (Section 301 25% + Section 122 10%).

Changes:
- Add docs/data/current-rates.json: curated static matrix with 40+ entries
  showing correct pre-calculated total rates per country/sector, sourced from
  confirmed executive orders, Federal Register rules, and USTR data
- Update data.js: add loadCurrentRates() function to fetch the curated file
- Update rate-matrix.js: load curated rates instead of computing from claims;
  make mount() async to support data fetch
- Update dashboard.js: await async mount() calls; mark view as mounted before
  render to prevent double-mount on quick tab switching
- Remove trend arrows from marks.js (docs and viz) per prior request

Key rate corrections:
  China Electronics: 25% → 35% (Section 301 + Section 122)
  China Steel: 25% → 50% (Section 232, exempt from Section 122)
  China Solar: 50% → 60% (Biden S301 50% + Section 122 10%)
  China Auto: 25% → 50% (Section 232 + Section 301)
  EU Steel: now correctly shows 25% (Section 232 rule-published)
  Cambodia Apparel: correctly shows 49% (reciprocal tariff, not paused)
  Indonesia/Thailand: correctly shows 10% (Section 122 baseline)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: track static HTML/favicon in git for Docker builds

The gitignore pattern `/resources/public/` ignored the directory itself,
preventing `!` negation patterns from working. Changed to
`/resources/public/*` (ignore contents) so index.html, admin.html,
and favicon.ico are properly tracked. Build artifacts (js/, assets/)
remain ignored.

* feat: add photo gallery section to About page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: swap duplicate gallery images and add CTA section to About page

Replace mt-igatmon.jpg and marathon-stats.jpg in the gallery with
gallery-napulak.jpg and gallery-taripis.jpg to avoid repeating
timeline images. Add "Join me on this journey" CTA section with
Browse Events and Get in Touch buttons.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add multi-photo gallery to journey timeline steps

Replace single images with JourneyStepGallery component supporting
swipe (mobile) and arrow navigation (desktop hover) with dot indicators.
Bundle contextual photos per step: bikes for The Beginning, runs for
Crossfit to Running, mountains for Discovering Hiking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: fix journey gallery layout collapsing on mobile

Move aspect ratio to wrapper div with absolute-positioned scroll
container inside, and use flex-none + explicit h-full/w-full on
slides so images size correctly on all screen widths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add w-full to timeline columns for mobile layout

The md:w-1/2 divs had no width on mobile, causing the gallery
(which uses w-full + aspect ratio) to collapse to zero width
under items-start flex alignment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add peek-scroll gallery and all hiking photos

Rework JourneyStepGallery to show adjacent photos peeking from the
sides (24px peek + 8px gap) so users know they can scroll. Move dot
indicators below the image. Add all 7 mountain photos to the
Discovering Hiking timeline step.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: rework gallery to card stack with slanted side cards

Center image sits on top (z-10), prev/next cards peek from behind
with 4deg rotation, 92% scale, and a dark overlay. Clicking a side
card or using arrows/dots animates the transition (500ms ease-out).
No scroll-based logic — pure state-driven with CSS transitions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add touch swipe and fix card stack overflow

Add touch swipe support (50px threshold) on the center card for
mobile navigation. Reduce side card size (80% width, 3deg rotation,
0.9 scale) and add px-4 padding to prevent cards from protruding
outside the container.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: fluid drag-to-swipe for card stack gallery

Center card follows finger in real-time during drag. Side cards
interpolate rotation/scale/overlay toward center as you drag toward
them. Releases use velocity + distance threshold to decide snap vs
bounce-back. Easing uses cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) for a
natural spring-like settle. Rubber-band effect at edges.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

fix: chain, auth, trpc, hooks updates

repository.name: treenity
repository.description: Grow the tree

commit.message:
fix: serialize worktree operations with filesystem lock (#93)

Concurrent `klausctl create` calls targeting the same source repository
can corrupt worktree git references because multiple `git worktree add`
commands race on the same .git directory.

Add an exclusive filesystem lock (flock) on <repo>/.git/klausctl.lock
that is held for the duration of both Create and Remove operations. This
serializes all worktree mutations per source repo across processes.

Closes #91

Co-authored-by: Klaus Agent <klaus@giantswarm.io>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: klausctl
repository.description: CLI for managing local klaus instances

commit.message:
fix(primitives): improve NumberField digit filtering and update translations

Replace revertAllChanges() with character-level filtering in
DigitsOnlyTransformation so pasted text retains valid digits instead
of being fully rejected. Update Russian and default string resources
with corrected translations and wording. Bump version to 0.0.4-alpha10.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
